mechanic.name: Full-auto Fire
mechanic.desc: Enhanced Assault Mode: Fires more bullets during Rapid Fire.

mechanic.name: Dark Ray
mechanic.desc: Enhanced Sniper Mode: Unleashes a more powerful dark ray after Dark Bullet.

mechanic.name: All Out
mechanic.desc: Enhanced Assault Mode: After continuous firing, Chaton summons a magic circle to fire Kitty Bullets outward.

mechanic.name: Secondary Beam
mechanic.desc: Enhanced Sniper Mode: Adds a follow-up attack to Laser Beam.

mechanic.name: Furious Kitty
mechanic.desc: Fires more Kitty Bullets during Kitty Barrage.

mechanic.name: Eye of the Meow Lord
mechanic.desc: Eye of the Demon Lord has increased tracking duration and tracking speed.

mechanic.name: DMG Increase: Lesser
mechanic.desc: Increases all enemy DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>10%</color>

mechanic.name: DMG Increase: Medium
mechanic.desc: Increases all enemy DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>

mechanic.name: DMG Increase: Greater
mechanic.desc: Increases all enemy DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color>

mechanic.name: Blood Thirst
mechanic.desc: Reduces Max HP by <color=#ec6d21>-50%</color>; restores main Trekker's Max HP by <color=#ec6d21>0.8%</color> each time her Skill DMG is dealt.

mechanic.name: Crit Tuning: DMG
mechanic.desc: Increases Crit DMG for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>40%</color>, but reduces Crit Rate by <color=#ec6d21>-30%</color>.

mechanic.name: Crit Tuning: Rate
mechanic.desc: Increases Crit Rate for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>15%</color>, but reduces Crit DMG by <color=#ec6d21>-30%</color>.

mechanic.name: Sluggish: Lesser
mechanic.desc: Increases Skill Cooldown for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>5%</color>.

mechanic.name: Sluggish: Medium
mechanic.desc: Increases Skill Cooldown for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>10%</color>.

mechanic.name: Sluggish: Greater
mechanic.desc: Increases Skill Cooldown for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>.

mechanic.name: Demon's Wrath: Lesser
mechanic.desc: Each time Chaton is hit by a skill attack, increases all DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>1%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times; max 1 stack per second.

mechanic.name: Demon's Wrath: Medium
mechanic.desc: Each time Chaton is hit by a skill attack, increases all DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>2.1%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times; max 1 stack per second.

mechanic.name: Demon's Wrath: Greater
mechanic.desc: Each time Chaton is hit by a skill attack, increases all DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>3.2%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times; max 1 stack per second.

mechanic.name: Mark Fade
mechanic.desc: Reduces the squad's Mark DMG by <color=#ec6d21>-80%</color> and increases Ultimate DMG by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>

mechanic.name: Auto Attack Nerf
mechanic.desc: Reduces the squad's Auto Attack DMG by <color=#ec6d21>-80%</color> and increases Skill DMG by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>

mechanic.name: Skill Nerf
mechanic.desc: Reduces the squad's Skill DMG by <color=#ec6d21>-80%</color> and increases Minion DMG by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>

mechanic.name: Demon's Body
mechanic.desc: Chaton initially takes <color=#ec6d21>-5%</color> reduced DMG. Every <color=#ec6d21>4</color>s, increases DMG RES by <color=#ec6d21>-0.2%</color>. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>45</color> times.

mechanic.name: Demon's Body: Greater
mechanic.desc: Chaton initially takes <color=#ec6d21>-10%</color> reduced DMG. Every <color=#ec6d21>2</color>s, increases DMG RES by <color=#ec6d21>-0.5%</color>. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>80</color> times.

mechanic.name: Disrupted Rhythm
mechanic.desc: When the Main Trekker is hit, reduces Skill DMG by <color=#ec6d21>-15%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s. This effect can be triggered once every <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s.

mechanic.name: Disrupted Rhythm: Greater
mechanic.desc: When the Main Trekker is hit, reduces Skill DMG by <color=#ec6d21>-35%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s. This effect can be triggered once every <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s.

mechanic.name: Quick Cycle
mechanic.desc: Reduces Ultimate DMG for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>-40%</color>, but increases Charge Efficiency by <color=#ec6d21>25%</color>.

mechanic.name: Battle Fatigue
mechanic.desc: Within <color=#ec6d21>10</color>s after any squadmate casts a skill, reduces Energy Regen by <color=#ec6d21>-20%</color>.

mechanic.name: Demon's Mark
mechanic.desc: When the Main Trekker is hit, increases DMG they take by <color=#ec6d21>2%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times.

mechanic.name: Demon's Mark: Greater
mechanic.desc: When the Main Trekker is hit, increases DMG they take by <color=#ec6d21>5%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times.

mechanic.name: Battle Enraged
mechanic.desc: Reduces DMG dealt by Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>-40%</color>. Each time the Main Trekker takes a hit, increases DMG dealt by Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>8</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>2</color> times.

mechanic.name: Cost of Assault
mechanic.desc: Increases Skill DMG for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>15%</color>, but increases DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color>.

mechanic.name: Defensive Stand
mechanic.desc: Reduces Skill DMG for the squad by <color=#ec6d21>-15%</color>, but reduces DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>-30%</color>.

mechanic.name: Deterioration: Lesser
mechanic.desc: Every <color=#ec6d21>10</color>s in battle, reduces DMG dealt by all Trekkers in the squad by <color=#ec6d21>-1.2%</color>. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>12</color> times.

mechanic.name: Deterioration: Medium
mechanic.desc: Every <color=#ec6d21>10</color>s in battle, reduces DMG dealt by all Trekkers in the squad by <color=#ec6d21>-2.4%</color>. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>12</color> times.

mechanic.name: Deterioration: Greater
mechanic.desc: Every <color=#ec6d21>10</color>s in battle, reduces DMG dealt by all Trekkers in the squad by <color=#ec6d21>-3.6%</color>. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>12</color> times.

mechanic.name: Cost of Evasion
mechanic.desc: After dodging, the Main Trekker loses <color=#ec6d21>-30</color> Ultimate Energy.

mechanic.name: Emergency Healing
mechanic.desc: When the Main Trekker's HP falls below <color=#ec6d21>10%</color>, immediately restores HP equal to <color=#ec6d21>80%</color> of Max HP, but all DMG dealt is reduced by <color=#ec6d21>-25%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>20</color>s. Cooldown: <color=#ec6d21>60</color>s.

mechanic.name: Cost of Healing
mechanic.desc: The Main Trekker restores HP equal to <color=#ec6d21>8%</color> of Max HP every <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s, but increases DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color>.

mechanic.name: Co-op Combat
mechanic.desc: Reduces DMG dealt by the Main Trekker by <color=#ec6d21>-40%</color>. Each time a Support Trekker deals DMG, increases the Main Trekker's DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>2%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s. Stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>20</color> times.

mechanic.name: Solo Combat
mechanic.desc: Increases DMG dealt by the Main Trekker by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>. After casting a Support Skill, reduces DMG dealt by the Main Trekker by <color=#ec6d21>-40%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s.

mechanic.name: Pain into Power
mechanic.desc: Increases the Main Trekker's DMG by <color=#ec6d21>50%</color>, but restores <color=#ec6d21>20</color> Energy upon taking DMG. This effect can be triggered once every <color=#ec6d21>2</color>s.

mechanic.name: Distraction Tactics
mechanic.desc: Increases Energy Regen for Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>, but reduces DMG dealt by the Main Trekker by <color=#ec6d21>-20%</color>.

mechanic.name: Sunflower Ties
mechanic.desc: Sunflower Dance enhanced: The shuriken Nanoha hurls is attached to a string. After a brief delay, she pulls the player toward her.

mechanic.name: Shrouded Moon: Meteor
mechanic.desc: Shrouded Moon enhanced: When Nanoha dashes, generates shurikens randomly on the battlefield.

mechanic.name: Shrouded Moon: Gale
mechanic.desc: Shrouded Moon enhanced: When Nanoha dashes, continuously summons clones to launch coordinated attacks.

mechanic.name: Entwined Gale
mechanic.desc: Scattered Gale enhanced: The kunai Nanoha throws is attached to a string. Nanoha retracts the kunai thrown.

mechanic.name: Shadow Dance: Leaf Storm
mechanic.desc: Shadow Dance: Leaf Barrier enhanced: Nanoha's clones will dash like her in Shrouded Moon, dealing DMG along their paths.

mechanic.name: Shadow Dance: Dream Wanderer
mechanic.desc: Shadow Dance: Wither enhanced: Nanoha summons more clones to launch coordinated attacks.

mechanic.desc: Increases all enemy DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>10%</color>

mechanic.desc: Increases all enemy DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>

mechanic.name: Ultimate Degen: Greater

mechanic.name: Crippling Blow
mechanic.desc: Increases Dodge Cooldown by <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s

mechanic.name: Dodge Debuff

mechanic.desc: After the Main Trekker casts a skill, increases DMG Taken by the Main Trekker by <color=#ec6d21>4%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>12</color>s, up to <color=#ec6d21>5</color> stacks

mechanic.name: Crit Rate Adjustment
mechanic.desc: The squad gains an extra <color=#ec6d21>15%</color> Crit Rate, but Crit DMG is reduced by <color=#ec6d21>-30%</color>

mechanic.name: Support Degen: Greater

mechanic.desc: The enemy gains a shield equal to <color=#ec6d21>5%</color> of Max HP. Enemy with a shield is immune to Resilience Break

mechanic.name: Shield: Greater

mechanic.name: Omni-Blade: Execution
mechanic.desc: Enhances Omni-Blade, allowing Firefly to follow up with a high-power slash after moving.

mechanic.desc: Enhances Cosmic Symphony, increasing the density and quantity of falling floating armaments.

mechanic.name: Light Hunter
mechanic.desc: Gains a new Skill: Light Hunter. Locks onto the Main Trekker, throws a floating sword, and follows up with a high-power slash.

mechanic.desc: After Firefly casts a skill, she gains an additional <color=#ec6d21>5</color> Heat.

mechanic.name: Eco Mode
mechanic.desc: When Firefly is All Fired Up, casting Skills costs <color=#ec6d21>5</color> less Heat.

mechanic.name: Warm-up Mode
mechanic.desc: When Firefly is not All Fired Up, she gains <color=#ec6d21>5</color> Heat every <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s.

mechanic.desc: Reduces Max HP by <color=#ec6d21>-50%</color>; restores main Trekker's Max HP by <color=#ec6d21>0.8%</color> each time her Skill DMG is dealt.

mechanic.desc: When Firefly hits a target, increases her DMG by <color=#ec6d21>15%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s.

mechanic.name: Risky Mend
mechanic.desc: When casting a skill, the Main Trekker recovers <color=#ec6d21>15%</color> Base Max HP, but cannot be healed for <color=#ec6d21>4</color>s upon taking DMG.

mechanic.name: Spotlight Thief
mechanic.desc: Increases Charge Efficiency for Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>. The Main Trekker loses <color=#ec6d21>15%</color> of current HP when a Support Trekker casts Ultimate.

mechanic.name: Energy Overdraft
mechanic.desc: The squad gains <color=#ec6d21>100%</color> Energy upon entering the stage, but reduces Charge Efficiency by <color=#ec6d21>-15%</color>.

mechanic.name: Energy Overdraft: Greater
mechanic.desc: The squad gains <color=#ec6d21>100%</color> Energy upon entering the stage, but reduces Charge Efficiency by <color=#ec6d21>-40%</color>.

mechanic.name: Perilous Evade
mechanic.desc: Upon dodging, increases DMG Taken by the Main Trekker by <color=#ec6d21>35%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>4</color>s.

mechanic.name: Cursed Counter
mechanic.desc: When the Main Trekker gets hit, reduces ATK SPD by <color=#ec6d21>-20%</color> for <color=#ec6d21>10</color>s.

mechanic.name: Pain into Power
mechanic.desc: The Main Trekker takes <color=#ec6d21>40%</color> more DMG, but gains <color=#ec6d21>20</color> Energy upon taking DMG.

mechanic.name: Cognitive Glitch
mechanic.desc: Increases the Main Trekker's Skill DMG by <color=#ec6d21>90%</color>, which then decreases by <color=#ec6d21>-6%</color> every <color=#ec6d21>6</color>s.

mechanic.name: Fair-Weather Fighter
mechanic.desc: When Firefly has more than <color=#ec6d21>70%</color> HP, reduces DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>-20%</color>; when her HP falls below <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>, increases DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>20%</color>.

mechanic.name: Fair-Weather Fighter: Greater
mechanic.desc: When Firefly has more than <color=#ec6d21>50%</color> HP, reduces DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>-40%</color>; when her HP falls below <color=#ec6d21>10%</color>, increases DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>10%</color>.

mechanic.name: Radiant Carapace: Lesser
mechanic.desc: When Firefly receives Skill DMG, she gains <color=#ec6d21>-1%</color> DMG RES for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s, stacking up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times. This effect stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>1</color> times per second.

mechanic.name: Radiant Carapace: Medium
mechanic.desc: When Firefly receives Skill DMG, she gains <color=#ec6d21>-2.5%</color> DMG RES for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s, stacking up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times. This effect stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>1</color> times per second.

mechanic.name: Radiant Carapace: Greater
mechanic.desc: When Firefly receives Skill DMG, she gains <color=#ec6d21>-4%</color> DMG RES for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s, stacking up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times. This effect stacks up to <color=#ec6d21>1</color> times per second.
